theme: Light mode only. The platform targets construction B2B buyers (India-first) requiring a clean, authoritative, and reliable visual presence.

typography.headings: Manrope. Provides an engineered, precise, and highly reliable feel appropriate for construction tech. Do NOT use Inter.
typography.body: IBM Plex Sans. Technical, crisp, highly legible for dense B2B reading.
typography.instructions: Use font-bold or font-extrabold for key headings to establish authority. Apply tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) on large headings. Never center-align long paragraphs.

colors.text_primary: #0F172A (Deep Navy / Slate 900 for high-contrast readability without the deadness of pure black)

visual_enhancers.style: Swiss Brutalist meets Enterprise SaaS. Focus on structural clarity, sharp 1px borders, and high typographic contrast. NO PHOTOS ALLOWED.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 1px solid borders (border-slate-200) to create a blueprint-like grid aesthetic. Sharp or slightly rounded corners (rounded-md).
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimalist. Use shadow-sm or purely flat design relying on borders for component separation. Do not use heavy or colored shadows.
visual_enhancers.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react. Use Regular or Duotone weights to act as technical illustrations and visual anchors since photography is strictly banned.
visual_enhancers.logo: Text wordmark 'FieldAssure AI' (Manrope Bold) paired with a geometric icon like ShieldCheck or CheckSquare from Phosphor Icons in Amber-600.

grids_and_layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-12 inside major structural containers. gap-6 to gap-8 for grids.
grids_and_layouts.hero: Asymmetrical layout. Massive left-aligned typography (text-5xl to text-6xl max). The right side should feature a clean, technical grid of Phosphor icons or structural SVG lines to substitute for the lack of photography.
grids_and_layouts.roles_grid: 7 cards: Use an asymmetrical Bento Grid (e.g., grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3) where some cards span 2 columns and others span 1 to create visual tension without relying on animations.
grids_and_layouts.modules_grid: 8 cards: Symmetrical, high-density 4x2 grid (grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4) with icon, title, and short description.

motion.rules: SUBTLE ONLY. Trust is paramount. No 3D, no marquees, no masking.
motion.interactions: Crisp CSS hover states (slight background color shift, border color darkening). Simple Framer Motion staggered fade-ups on scroll (opacity: 0 to 1, y: 15 to 0 over 0.4s) for lists and grids.

pages_and_components.navigation: Sticky header (bg-white/95 backdrop-blur border-b border-slate-200). Links: Product, Use Cases, Pricing, About, Contact. CTA: Request Demo (amber button).
home_sections: Hero: Headline 'FieldAssure AI helps...', Subhead, Primary CTA (Request Demo), Secondary CTA (View Product)
Problem: 7 questions structured as a crisp vertical checklist with amber check/warning icons
Product Explanation: Text-driven value prop alongside an abstract icon-based workflow diagram
How it works: 5 steps formatted as connected horizontal nodes or a numbered vertical progression
Role-based Value: 7 role cards (Owners, PMs, HSE, QA/QC, Compliance, Finance, Contractors) in a bento layout
Modules Grid: 8 cards featuring technical iconography
Pricing Preview: 3 tiers (Starter, Project, Enterprise). Highlight 'Project' tier with an amber border and 'Most Popular' badge.
Request Demo: Static form with Name, Company, Email, Phone, Role, Project size, Message. Must have client-side validation and a success state replacing the form upon submission.
Footer: Minimalist, columns for links, disclaimer, and copyright.
pages_and_components.placeholder_pages: Product, Use Cases, Pricing, Request Demo, About/Contact. Each features a simple, centered layout with an H1, short descriptive paragraph, and a CTA returning to Home or triggering the Demo form.

accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements, links, forms, and accordion triggers MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-request-demo-btn').
accessibility_and_testing.forms: Use highly visible focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-amber-600 focus:outline-none) for all inputs.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure the amber-600 accent color contains white or very dark navy text for optimal contrast ratio.

tech_stack_instructions.components: Use shadcn/ui primitives. Override default shadcn rounded corners to be sharper (rounded-sm or rounded-md) to fit the structural aesthetic.

UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: STRICTLY NO PHOTOS OR STOCK IMAGES. Rely entirely on typography, structural borders, and Phosphor/Lucide icons.
DO NOT default to generic centered layouts for content-heavy sections. Use left-alignment for B2B clarity.
Ensure the theme remains light mode with deep navy/charcoal text to evoke an engineering blueprint / enterprise software feel.
The 'Request Demo' form MUST function purely on the client side, hiding the form and displaying a styled success message upon submission.
Never use fully transparent header backgrounds; always ensure legibility with a solid or blurred light background.
